OptionDescription.SourceString: Text shown when player is not the right team/class for interaction, default is '{failurereason}'. Using '{failurereason}' will auto-complete with 'Invalid Team,' 'Invalid Class,' or 'Invalid Team & Class.' Clear to hide the interaction.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: Text shown when player is not the right team/class for interaction, default is '{failurereason}'. Using '{failurereason}' will auto-complete with 'Invalid Team,' 'Invalid Class,' or 'Invalid Team & Class.' Clear to hide the interaction.
